data.title: Nokia Q3: Earnings Miss, CEO Cites Telecom Weakness And Anticipates India Demand Rebound
data.description: Nokia reported a 7% decline in net sales and missed analyst estimates. Comparable EPS was lower, but net income increased. Margins improved, and CEO expects growth in Q4. Market share declined in North America, but Nokia is targeting other sectors for growth.

data.title: Meta Cuts Jobs in WhatsApp, Instagram, and Reality Labs In Latest Reorganization
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) has initiated smaller, department-specific layoffs in an internal reorganization, part of long-term strategy.

data.title: TSMC On Cusp Of Topping $1 Trillion Valuation As Stock Jumps 8% In Premarket: What's Going On
data.description: TSMC is riding the crest of the AI frenzy, with the technology fueling the Taiwanese foundry's third-quarter results.

data.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Energy Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
EXCLUSIVE: Worksport Targets $2M in Savings With Strategic Cuts, Set to Launch New Clean-Tech Products in 2025
data.description: Worksport Ltd (NASDAQ: WKSP) announced cost-saving measures to boost efficiency and growth, saving $1.5 million in 2025 and targeting significant revenue and cash flow growth by expanding tonneau cover business and launching clean tech products. Three new products expected on schedule. CEO Steven Rossi stated the measures will improve margins and financial standing without compromising innovation. Worksport also introduced 19 new models and is working on the Extreme Climate Heat Pump. Stock closed up 6.27%.
